title: UPDATE on table with two generated columns and CHECK clause results in segfault
description:
mrigger added on 2019-11-06 23:10:53:
The following test case results in a segfault:
CREATE TABLE t0(c0, c1 AS(c0 + c2), c2 AS(c1) CHECK(c2));
UPDATE t0 SET c0 = NULL; -- Segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (a + 1), c INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (b + 2) CHECK (c > 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(x VARCHAR(255), y VARCHAR(255) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (UPPER(x)), z VARCHAR(255) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (y) CHECK (z IS NOT NULL));
key_bug_features: UPDATE on table with generated columns and CHECK clause
